title: Upper Yard Splits the Fighters
description: Zoro pushes through the Upper Yard battlefield as Shandia warriors and Enel’s agents continue to fall one by one.
scene: Across pages 10, 11, 12, 13, this scene centers on Eneru, Enel, Luffy, Wyper, Zoro. Zoro pushes through the Upper Yard battlefield as Shandia warriors and Enel’s agents continue to fall one by one.

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: Exactly S will still be standing.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: One hour before God Enell's predicted time...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That's God enel!! Why is he here!!?

summary: Zoro pushes through the Upper Yard battlefield as Shandia warriors and Enel’s agents continue to fall one by one.
